nasb.text: Furthermore, I have seen under the sun that in the place of justice there is wickedness and in the place of righteousness there is wickedness.

esv.text: Moreover, I saw under the sun that in the place of justice, even there was wickedness, and in the place of righteousness, even there was wickedness.

cnv.text: 我在日光之下又看見：審判的地方有奸惡，維護公義的地方也有奸惡。

ccb.text: 我又看到日光之下，即使在公道和正义之地也有邪恶。

csbs.text: 我还看到在日光之下，在审判的地方有奸恶，在公义的地方也有奸恶。
